name: Apple Pie #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Make your favorite pie crust (top and bottom).
2. Boil water, sugar, and cream of tartar.
3. Add whole crackers one at a time, boiling for 2 minutes.
4. Add remaining ingredients.
5. Cool mixture.
6. Pour into prepared pie shell.
7. Cover with top crust.
8. Slit top for steam vents.
9. Bake at 425 degrees for 10 minutes.
10. Reduce heat to 350 degrees.
11. Continue baking for 20 to 25 minutes or until golden brown.
12. Turn off heat and cool. Makes 1 pie.
